sentences.en: Splash some water on your face to wake up.
sentences.zh: 用水拍拍臉，讓自己清醒過來。
sentences.ipa: /splæʃ sʌm ˈwɔːtər ɑːn jɔːr feɪs tə weɪk ʌp/

sentences.en: Please don't slurp your soup so loudly.
sentences.zh: 喝湯請不要發出這麼大的聲音。
sentences.ipa: /pliːz doʊnt slɜːrp jɔːr suːp soʊ ˈlaʊdli/

sentences.en: Time to towel off and get dry.
sentences.zh: 該用毛巾把身體擦乾了。
sentences.ipa: /taɪm tə ˈtaʊəl ɔːf ænd ɡɛt draɪ/

sentences.en: Let's feed the ducks by the pond.
sentences.zh: 我們去池塘邊餵鴨子吧。
sentences.ipa: /lɛts fiːd ðə dʌks baɪ ðə pɑːnd/

sentences.en: Take turns on the monkey bars.
sentences.zh: 玩攀爬架要輪流喔。
sentences.ipa: /teɪk tɜːrnz ɑːn ðə ˈmʌŋki bɑːrz/

sentences.en: Don't forget to hand in your homework.
sentences.zh: 別忘了交作業。
sentences.ipa: /doʊnt fərˈɡɛt tə hænd ɪn jɔːr ˈhoʊmwɜːrk/

sentences.en: Show your work step by step.
sentences.zh: 把計算過程一步一步寫出來。
sentences.ipa: /ʃoʊ jɔːr wɜːrk stɛp baɪ stɛp/

sentences.en: Trade the red car for the blue one.
sentences.zh: 用紅色車子跟他換藍色的吧。
sentences.ipa: /treɪd ðə rɛd kɑːr fɔːr ðə bluː wʌn/

sentences.en: It's okay to ask for a hug.
sentences.zh: 想要抱抱是可以說出來的。
sentences.ipa: /ɪts oʊˈkeɪ tə æsk fɔːr ə hʌɡ/

sentences.en: You lose a sticker if you don't listen.
sentences.zh: 不聽話的話就會少一張貼紙喔。
sentences.ipa: /juː luːz ə ˈstɪkər ɪf juː doʊnt ˈlɪsən/

sentences.en: What a thoughtful thing to do!
sentences.zh: 你做的這件事真體貼！
sentences.ipa: /wʌt ə ˈθɔːtfəl θɪŋ tə duː/

sentences.en: Wait for the green light to cross.
sentences.zh: 要等綠燈才能過馬路。
sentences.ipa: /weɪt fɔːr ðə ɡriːn laɪt tə krɔːs/

sentences.en: Rest in bed until your fever goes down.
sentences.zh: 好好躺床休息，等退燒了再說。
sentences.ipa: /rɛst ɪn bɛd ənˈtɪl jɔːr ˈfiːvər ɡoʊz daʊn/

sentences.en: Let's bring flowers for Grandpa today.
sentences.zh: 我們今天帶花去給爺爺吧。
sentences.ipa: /lɛts brɪŋ ˈflaʊərz fɔːr ˈɡrænpɑː təˈdeɪ/

sentences.en: Invite your friend to sit with you.
sentences.zh: 邀你的朋友坐在你旁邊吧。
sentences.ipa: /ɪnˈvaɪt jɔːr frɛnd tə sɪt wɪð juː/

sentences.en: Push in your chair when you leave the table.
sentences.zh: 離開餐桌時把椅子推回去。
sentences.ipa: /pʊʃ ɪn jɔːr tʃɛr wɛn juː liːv ðə ˈteɪbəl/

sentences.en: It's snowing, let's build a snowman.
sentences.zh: 下雪了，我們來堆雪人吧。
sentences.ipa: /ɪts ˈsnoʊɪŋ lɛts bɪld ə ˈsnoʊmæn/

sentences.en: Only one video, then we turn it off.
sentences.zh: 只能看一支影片，然後就要關掉。
sentences.ipa: /ˈoʊnli wʌn ˈvɪdioʊ ðɛn wiː tɜːrn ɪt ɔːf/

sentences.en: Let's hang up the birthday banner.
sentences.zh: 我們把生日布條掛起來吧。
sentences.ipa: /lɛts hæŋ ʌp ðə ˈbɜːrθdeɪ ˈbænər/

sentences.en: Turn the page gently so it doesn't tear.
sentences.zh: 輕輕翻頁，才不會把書撕破。
sentences.ipa: /tɜːrn ðə peɪdʒ ˈdʒɛntli soʊ ɪt ˈdʌzənt tɛr/
